title: Better MC
description: This is a modpack that strives to rival OptiFine while adding additional features.
body:
Welcome to A Better Minecraft, a Fabric Vanilla+ modpack & OptiFine alternative with a few additional features. These include a better video settings UI, a Mods menu, an Armor Hud mod, a Just Enough Items crafting book experience, Fullbright, and an enhanced hunger bar. 

~~~~~~~~ Main Features ~~~~~~~~

Updates way faster than OptiFine.

You can join plugin-based or Vanilla servers without an issue.

Our graphics/performance enhancements is mainly powered by Sodium, with a couple other mods to help out.

The highly customizable video settings of OptiFine are also here, brought to you by a variety of different mods.

Shaders are supported by Iris Shaders, with 2 shader packs already installed.

Zooming is also here courtesy of Zoomify.

~~~~~~~ Additional Features ~~~~~~~

Additional features include Fullbright and Night Vision from Gamma Utils.

Hunger bar improvements from AppleSkin.

Crafting book improvements from Just Enough Items.

Armor showed in an offhand type slot from Armor Hud made by yours truly.

~~~~~~~~ Extra Information ~~~~~~~~

Official Website.

Bug report and git repo is on the site.
